home.description: Explore the collection of tools for Prosperous Universe. Use the links below to navigate to different tools and resources available in the Auroras Explorer.
home.featuredToolsDescription: The following tools are not provided by us, but they are very essential tools. We recommend you to use them.
home.contactSuggestion: If you have any suggestions for tools to be added to the gallery, please feel free to contact us. We are always looking for ways to improve the Auroras Explorer and provide more value to the Prosperous Universe community.

list.title: Groups List
list.description: Hi, {{username}}. This is a collaboration tool for viewing and managing contracts and plans with your group members. You can create a group on FIO. Create a token and set it here, then you can view the group's contracts and plans, and manage them together.

empty.title: No Groups Yet
empty.description: You haven't joined any groups yet. Create a group to start collaborating with your team.

form.createDescription: Link a FIO group to start tracking. You must be an admin of the FIO group.
form.editDescription: Update the group settings. You must be an admin of the FIO group.
form.fioApiTokenDescription: A FIO API token with access to this group.
form.submitError: An error occurred. Please try again.

docs.title: Game Guide
docs.description: Learn about the game mechanics, materials, production chains, and more.

gettingStarted.title: Getting Started
gettingStarted.description: An introduction to Prosperous Universe — the core gameplay loop, your first base, and workforce tiers.

materials.title: Material Categories
materials.description: Overview of all 370+ materials organized by category — from raw ores to endgame ship components.

rawMaterials.title: Raw Materials
rawMaterials.description: Ores, gases, minerals, and elements — how planetary extraction works and which buildings process what.

metalsAlloys.title: Metals & Alloys
metalsAlloys.description: Smelting chains, alloy recipes, and which metals feed which downstream products.

construction.title: Construction Materials
construction.description: The 4-tier prefab system, 12 construction parts, 11 bulk materials, and what each habitation costs.

chemicalsPlastics.title: Chemicals & Plastics
chemicalsPlastics.description: 21 chemicals + 8 plastics + 3 liquids. CHP/LAB/POL chains, PE economics, and rare reagents.

electronics.title: Electronics & Software
electronics.description: The 4-tier electronics chain from pieces to systems, plus software dependencies (SD/SE/SL) and WAI.

shipComponents.title: Ship Components
shipComponents.description: 63 ship parts across hulls, kits, engines, and shields. The deepest production chain in the game.

specialty.title: Specialty Materials
specialty.description: Textiles, unit prefabs, energy, drones, medical, and infrastructure — the smaller chains that connect everything.

production.title: Production & Recipes
production.description: How recipes work, production chain depth, key buildings, and planning tips.

agriculturalProducts.title: Agricultural Products
agriculturalProducts.description: All 19 crops — food, beverage, textile, and industrial. Production buildings, RAT recipes, and efficiency tips.

consumables.title: Consumables
consumables.description: What every workforce tier needs to keep working — basic needs, luxuries, and pre-packaged bundles.

configTransform.title: Config Transform
configTransform.description: Don't ask me what this is. If you know it, you know it.
configTransform.pasteConfigHint: Paste the XIT ACT config JSON to transform.
configTransform.noResultYet: No result yet. Paste a config and the result will appear here.

errors.notFoundDescription: The page you are looking for does not exist.
errors.generic: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
